name: widget-workshop
description: Agents and skills for Widget Workshop component development. Route workflows, write component code, validate APIs, review packages, and keep manifests, settings, permissions, and Workshop-ready metadata aligned.

interface.shortDescription: Build and validate Widget Workshop components.
interface.longDescription: End-to-end component developer assistance for Widget Workshop: route workflows, create package folders, write manifest and settings files, use window.widgetWorkshop safely, validate contracts, review permissions, and prepare Workshop-ready metadata.
defaultPrompt: Create a Widget Workshop component from this idea.
Validate this Widget Workshop component package.
Review these window.widgetWorkshop calls and permissions.
Route this Widget Workshop component task to the right Skill.
